ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "is_listed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the company is publicly listed */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the company data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Market size of the industry */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Average annual growth rate of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the sector belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Market size of the sector */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Average annual growth rate of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the statement belongs to */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet) */,
  "year_ending" TEXT /* Year ending of the financial statement */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "equity" REAL /* Equity of the company */,
  "cash_flow_operating" REAL /* Cash flow from operating activities */,
  "cash_flow_investing" REAL /* Cash flow from investing activities */,
  "cash_flow_financing" REAL /* Cash flow from financing activities */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization (EBITDA) */,
  "interest_expense" REAL /* Interest expense of the company */,
  "tax_expense" REAL /* Tax expense of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_on_capital_employed" (
  "roce_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROCE entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the ROCE data belongs to */,
  "year_ending" TEXT /* Year ending of the financial period */,
  "roce_percentage" REAL /* ROCE percentage of the company */,
  "capital_employed" REAL /* Capital employed by the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roce_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_on_capital_employed_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the management belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the management member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the management member */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of appointment */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the management member */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the management member */,
  "linked_in_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the management member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_management_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the market index */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_indices" (
  "company_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-index relationship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the company in the market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_indices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_indices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the ratios belong to */,
  "year_ending" TEXT /* Year ending of the financial period */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt to equity ratio */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio */,
  "quick_ratio" REAL /* Quick ratio */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity */,
  "interest_coverage_ratio" REAL /* Interest coverage ratio */,
  "price_to_book_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Book (P/B) ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the news article is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the event is related to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Earnings Report, Dividend Announcement) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_events_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financial_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial goal */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the goal belongs to */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of financial goal (e.g., Revenue Target, Profit Margin Target) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., In Progress, Achieved, Missed) */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financial_goals_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-competitor relationship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "competitor_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competitor company */,
  "relationship_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the competitive relationship (e.g., Strong, Moderate, Weak) */,
  "competitive_advantage" TEXT /* Description of the company's competitive advantage over the competitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_competitors_competitor_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_competitors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financial_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial comparison */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "competitor_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competitor company */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of financial comparison (e.g., Revenue, Profit Margin) */,
  "company_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric for the company */,
  "competitor_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric for the competitor */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the comparison */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between the company value and competitor value */,
  "percentage_difference" REAL /* Percentage difference between the company value and competitor value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financial_comparisons_competitor_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financial_comparisons_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Analyst, Investor, Admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date the user last changed their password */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
